headline: Costco and FedEx Face Lawsuits Over Tariff Refunds
summary: Billions in repayments spark debate over who should benefit

headline: FedEx (FDX) Reshapes Cost Base With Rich Pilot Deal and Freight Spin-Off Plan
summary: FedEx Corp. recently advanced a tentative five-year contract with its pilots' union for member ratification, featuring a very large hourly pay increase, back pay, and additional annual raises beginning in 2028, while also outlining leadership changes and an upcoming spin-off of FedEx Freight. This combination of richer pilot terms, evolving fuel and surcharge dynamics, and a major business separation could reshape FedEx’s cost base, labor stability, and long-term operating profile. We’ll now...

headline: Tariff Refund Claims Open Monday —Up To $127 Billion Could Flow Back To Importers, But Consumers May Get Nothing
summary: Businesses can claim IEEPA tariff refunds from Monday via CBP's online portal, with filings opening at 8 a.m.
